case_title: TOMPKINS, NANCY VS FOX, HILARY ALICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $701.25 FILED BY TOMPKINS, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT FOX, HILARY ALICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FOX, HILARY ALICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOMPKINS, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOX, HILARY ALICE $701.25 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $741.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FOX, HILARY ALICE
DEFT'S ATTACHED DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO VACATE & MOTION TO SHORTEN TIME FOR HEARING FILED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-05-1996, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT FOX, HILARY ALICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FOX, HILARY ALICE HEARING SET FOR NOV-05-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
